title: Wolves score late winner to secure shock win against Liverpool
fullText: Andre scores a 94th minute winner as bottom club Wolves beat Liverpool 2-1 at Molineux to secure just their third win in the Premier League this season. MATCH REPORT: Wolverhampton Wanderers 2-1 LiverpoolAvailable to UK users only.
summary: Andre scores a 94th minute winner as bottom club Wolves beat Liverpool 2-1 at Molineux to secure just their third win in the Premier League this season.
